data.html:
{
  "name": "@open-design/tools-dev",
  "version": "0.10.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "bin": {
    "tools-dev": "./bin/tools-dev.mjs"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "node ./esbuild.config.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ../../packages/metatool/src/cli.ts write .",
    "dev": "tsx ./src/index.ts",
    "test": "node --import tsx --test tests/*.test.ts",
    "typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@open-design/platform": "workspace:*",
    "@open-design/sidecar": "workspace:*",
    "@open-design/sidecar-proto": "workspace:*",
    "cac": "6.7.14"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "24.12.2",
    "esbuild": "0.28.0",
    "tsx": "4.22.3",
    "typescript": "6.0.3"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": "~24"
  }
}
